title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Suven Pharmaceuticals

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Suven Pharmaceuticals
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? Suven Pharmaceuticals in Indore offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Suven Pharmaceuticals:
Suven Pharmaceuticals is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Suven Pharmaceuticals!
